---
title: "Remote Sensing Video Series (Part 1)"
date: 2026-03-15
author: "KAXA Team"
categories: [Video Series, Remote Sensing]
description: "Episode 1 of a learning series on satellite imagery, data interpretation, and real use cases."
image: /image/kaxa-logo-color.png
---

This video-series entry is a placeholder for your first episode.

When ready, you can add:

- An embedded YouTube/Vimeo video
- Episode objectives
- Slide links and references
- Homework or practice tasks
